content: Can you summarize the last action runs

| `f50178af` | chat: interactive turn for live-1778178602855-fkdz4l |
| `389a797f` | chat: start interactive session live-1778178602855-fkdz4l |

These all appear to be automated chat session operations for session `live-1778178602855-fkdz4l`, consisting of alternating "append turn" and "interactive turn" actions.

Would you like me to show more details about any specific commit or the full git log?
